column2: So Few Led by So Many
Pouppeville, France, June 6th, 1944. The 3rd battalion of the 501st, with General Taylor and only 40 assembled men (many of them officers), must take Causeway 1 and eliminate the German garrison.
The American player wins by eliminating all of the German combat units by the end of turn 7. Otherwise the German player wins.
All American units start set up anywhere on board 10.
All German units start set up anywhere on board 1.
The German player may exchange 3 2nd Line Squads for 2 1st Line Squads and 1 1st Line DECOY.
